expert_rss.summary:

expert_rss.summary: Joint Interagency Task Force 401 announced the first set of purchases completed through its new counter-unmanned aircraft systems marketplace, four acquisitions  collectively valued at $13 million.

expert_rss.title: Africom Commences Exercise Flintlock 2026 in Africa
expert_rss.summary: U.S. Africa Command hosted dual opening ceremonies in Libya and Côte d'Ivoire, officially beginning Exercise Flintlock 2026, its annual combined special operations exercise.

expert_rss.title: Marines Conduct Cargo UAS Shipboard Testing
expert_rss.summary: The Marine Corps recently conducted shipboard testing with the TRV-150C tactical resupply unmanned aircraft system aboard an amphibious transport dock ship, marking a significant milestone in advancing ship-to-shore and ship-to-ship resupply solutions for combat logistics battalions.

expert_rss.title: Army Engineers Conduct Bridge-Building Exercise in Texas
expert_rss.summary: Army Reserve soldiers assigned to the 401st Engineer Company conducted a multiday bridge-building exercise designed to train new troops and refresh skills at Bardwell Lake, Texas.

expert_rss.summary: Joint Interagency Task Force 401 and Joint Task Force National Capital Region recently coordinated a training exercise at Fort Belvoir, Va., as part of a synchronized effort to advance counter-drone capabilities.

expert_rss.title: Arkansas National Guard Honors America's 250th Birthday by Enlisting 250 Recruits
expert_rss.summary: To celebrate America's 250th birthday this year, the Arkansas National Guard enlisted 250 recruits during a ceremony at the MacArthur Museum of Arkansas Military History in Little Rock, Ark.

expert_rss.summary:

expert_rss.title: B-21 Raider Seen From Above For The First Time
expert_rss.summary:
A new image of aerial refueling trials gives us our first full overhead look at the B-21 and a glimpse at some very interesting features.
The post B-21 Raider Seen From Above For The First Time appeared first on The War Zone.

expert_rss.summary:
The MQ-4C had been flying over the Persian Gulf on April 9 when it suddenly disappeared from online flight tracking sites.

expert_rss.summary:
Meanwhile, CENTCOM says the blockade is working as communications between Washington and Tehran continue in hopes of more in-person talks.

expert_rss.title: Senate Republicans back Trump military sales to Israel
expert_rss.summary: The Senate on Wednesday blocked two resolutions that would have stopped the sale of some $450 million in bombs and bulldozers to Israel.

expert_rss.title: White House offers no hint of Iran war cost as it seeks military funding surge
expert_rss.summary: "I don't have a ballpark," White House budget director Russell Vought told lawmakers Wednesday about the cost of the Iran war.

expert_rss.title: US Navy destroyer intercepts Iranian-flagged vessel trying to skirt blockade
expert_rss.summary: Zero vessels have broken through the U.S. Navy blockade of the Strait of Hormuz since it began Monday, U.S. Central Command stated.

expert_rss.title: US Air Force debuts operational AI wargame system
expert_rss.summary: WarMatrix is an AI-powered system meant to keep human judgement central to wargaming and was marked operational during an event in late March.

expert_rss.title: AeroVironment launches new multifunctional drone variant
expert_rss.summary: The MAYHEM 10 drone, a part of the Switchblade family, will serve as a multifunctional launch system, capable of deploying from various platforms.
